items.name: Valkenheimer
items.description:
Forged by the master artisan himself, this legendary sword boasts a mesmerizing fusion of vibrant green and violet hues that grace its formidable blade. Meticulously crafted, the weapon effortlessly slices through resilient armored foes. The hilt, an artistic marvel, features the black claws of an otherworldly creature enveloping an emblem exuding both power and modesty. A symbol of triumph against countless adversaries, this extraordinary sword represents the pinnacle of some of the greatest talent in our era...

Created by VOEW; This sword uses PBR materials and dynamically changes based on the lighting of the experience your in!
